description: Supported the maintenance of railway electrical systems. Conducted inspections and troubleshooting to ensure operational reliability, and contributed to improving safety standards and maintenance efficiency.

Managed and facilitated the development of POLINES students' interests and talents in sports. Coordinated 15 internal staff and systematically managed routine training schedules for nine sports divisions.

Responsible for preventive and corrective maintenance of church facilities to ensure operational readiness, particularly for audio and visual equipment. Conducted routine inspections of infrastructure and electrical components, and managed inventory and maintenance records to ensure all equipment is properly maintained.
